name: NEW_TARGETPAIRS_BY_TECHCLASS1_3Y
description: New target pairs by TechnologyClass1 category last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH tp, min(y.year) AS first_year, max_year
WHERE first_year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, first_year
ORDER BY first_year DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: Within the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, which target pairs were first disclosed in the last three years?
Within the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category, which target pairs were first disclosed during the most recent three-year window?
Which target pairs in the Other Immune-Checkpoint-Related Mechanisms TechnologyClass1 category first appeared in the last three years?
